title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zomato - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zomato - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zomato family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zomato:
Zomato is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
